title: 終幕　あの窓からこぼれる光

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki and I have completed the crucial first
three years of her career in the Twinkle Series,
and we're basking in our victories.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hey there, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Do you happen to be free this weekend? There's
somewhere I want to bring you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I am free, so I agree to accompany her. It turns
out the place she wanted to bring me is...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! It's an amusement park!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to bring you here as thanks for staying
by my side and supporting me these past three
years!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Here, give me your hand! I'll be your guide today.
What kind of rides do you like?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki is enthusiastic about her role as guide.
First, she takes me to the merry-go-round...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Look this way! Cheeese!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then to a roller coaster...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Don't worry, I'll be right there with you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then we have lunch and watch a parade. We're
having a very fulfilling day at the amusement
park!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! That was so scary! They're smart, making
you lower your guard and then terrifying you with
one last surprise.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, it's getting late. We should think about
leaving soon.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What do you want to do now? Should we round
out the day with a ride on the Ferris wheel?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We get in line for the Ferris wheel as the setting
sun bathes the park in golden light.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So? Did you have fun today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She regards me with an earnest expression.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I've actually been wanting to treat you to a
day of fun for a while now.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Remember how I was feeling a lot of pressure
after I started senior year?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She must be talking about the time shortly after
the Yasuda Kinen. I recall how panicked she was
back then.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was way past my limits at the time, but I was
surprised by how quickly I picked myself up again
after speaking with you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
A large part of it was because of your
encouragement, but it wasn't just that.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It was also because I had someone waiting for me
in the wings, and just knowing that made me
stand taller.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And that wasn't the only time. Right after our
final senior race, the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, to be honest, I was thinking how it wouldn't
be so bad to take things more slowly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I thought about talking to you about it, but when
I came through the runners' tunnel and saw you
waiting for me with a smile...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
All thoughts about slowing down just...
disappeared from my mind.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Instead, I wondered what my next goal should be!
What kind of miracle I should show the world!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I believed that with you by my side, I could do
anything and go anywhere I wanted!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Your mere presence gave me the resolution I
needed to face the big stage.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If not for you, I might have stepped down from
the stage altogether.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I owe a lot to you. So I wanted to ask...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She grows quiet.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Will you please stay by my side?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki takes my hand and pulls me up the
stairs to the Ferris wheel just as a carriage swings
gently to a stop before us.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Come on!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Outside the carriage, the sky is a swirl of cotton
candy reds and blues. The first star of the evening
twinkles bright on the shifting tapestry.
